title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Tab UI
scenario: Notifications & Device Alerts tab UI under General settings does not match Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
On the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Account/Settings section.
In the General settings screen, tap on the 'Notifications & Device Alerts' tab.
Observe the menu items, layout, icons, toggles, and text displayed under the Notifications & Device Alerts tab.
Compare the observed UI elements against the approved Figma design for the Notifications & Device Alerts screen.
expected: The Notifications & Device Alerts tab UI matches the Figma design exactly, including correct menu items, layout, icons, toggle states, and text labels.
